canonical_release_area_evidence.claim_boundary: Release-area blockers are sourced from pm_release_gate_report.json.release_area_blockers and are distinct from release-tier/open blocker lists used for owner handoff.

claim_boundary: This packet groups open PM blocker and release-tier evidence requests by owner. It does not create or replace tracked CI streaks, human UX observations, product/legal license approval, independent V&V, family validation signoff, customer audit/failure bundle acceptance, support SLA approval, or any other external release evidence. When reviewer handoff evidence is supplied, each open blocker must also show which release-tier promotion it blocks; missing tier-impact mapping keeps the owner handoff blocked. This packet does not convert missing evidence into a release pass.

acceptance_criteria: `github_actions_ci_streak_evidence.json` refreshed for the release signoff window

expected_intake_details.claim_boundary: This packet is an owner handoff checklist for CI streak evidence. It independently re-verifies github_actions_ci_streak_evidence.json and does not convert local gate artifacts or manifest-only claims into release streak credit; PR and nightly release credit still require tracked consecutive-pass GitHub Actions evidence for the configured release window.

expected_intake_details.claim_boundary: This intake packet is an owner handoff checklist. It does not create legal approval and does not make the PM security release area pass until the closure report passes.

field_request_rows.owner_note: Must reflect an approved product/legal decision, not a draft state.
Must stay inside the PM-approved paid-pilot or limited-commercial boundary.
Template values such as LICENSE-ID are rejected.
Template values such as product-or-legal-owner are rejected.
Role is separate from the human approver identity and must be one of the allowed release roles.
Template values such as LEGAL-OR-PRODUCT-APPROVAL-ID are rejected.
Approval timestamp must be timezone-aware and no later than the report generation time.
Approval reference identifies the decision; evidence_ref points to the retrievable artifact.
field_request_rows.required_value: https URL, supported external ref, or existing local evidence path

field_request_rows.owner_note: Scope should preserve the PM claim boundary: review assist, specified families/workflows, evidence package.
Expired or missing validity evidence keeps the release-area security gate blocked.
Approval date must be internally consistent with current validity.
field_request_rows.required_value: approved_at_utc <= now and approved_at_utc <= expiry when not perpetual

field_request_rows.owner_note: A license identifier cannot also serve as the approval decision evidence reference.
